response:
Subject: Farewell and Best Wishes

Dear Team,

As I prepare to move on to new opportunities, I wanted to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude for the incredible time I've spent working alongside each of you. Your support, camaraderie, and shared dedication have made this journey truly memorable. I am excited about what the future holds, but I will always cherish the friendships and experiences we've built together. Please keep in touch, and I look forward to hearing about your continued successes. Thank you once again for everything.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]
